creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
The oxford semi support was only for serial ports. It didn't add support for the 0xc110 device, so it's no wonder than the other patch didn't affect this.

Since this was filed against a now unsupported version of FreeBSD, I can only offer our apologies for being tardy in replying. I'm closing this bug. However,
if it's still a problem, please reopen the bug and I'll look into a bit more. It looks like a fair bit of work to add parallel port support, however.
